description: Tracks each workflow execution with run metadata, step completion counts, duration, trigger source, and final output or error summary.

Steps Total.description: Total step count in the workflow

Steps Skipped.description: Number of skipped steps (e.g., due to conditional logic or upstream failure)

Triggered By.description: How the workflow execution was initiated

Context Snapshot.description: JSON of final context state at execution end

Error Summary.description: First error message if execution failed

notes: Lazy creation by database name on first workflow execution. Idempotent upsert by Run ID (UUID guarantees uniqueness). Status transitions: Running -> Completed | Failed | Partial. Steps Total = Steps Completed + Steps Failed + Steps Skipped. Context Snapshot stored as JSON rich_text. Error Summary populated only when Status is Failed or Partial.
